text:
The Flying Lizard(トビヤモリ, Tobiyamori) is a type of Magical Beast that's native to Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Flying Lizard is part of the Midonite fauna and drops the Flying Lizard Meat that is requested by the Gourmet Hunter Menchi for her sidequest.
